    Saturday - Enum constant in enum class enums.RestaurantSettingsDays
     
    SATURDAY - Enum constant in enum class enums.Day
     
    savedInfo - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    Map to save information about the client such as its login ID.
    SceneManager - Class in util
    Utility class for managing scene navigation in the application.
    SceneManager() - Constructor for class util.SceneManager
     
    SCHEDULE - Enum constant in enum class enums.ReportType
     
    scheduleAutoCancel(int) - Method in class logicControllers.WaitingListController
    Schedules an automatic task to cancel a reservation if the guest fails to check in within 15 minutes of their scheduled time.
    scheduler - Static variable in class logicControllers.WaitingListController
    Scheduler for managing time-sensitive tasks, such as auto-cancelling reservations for no-shows.
    SEAT_CUSTOMER - Enum constant in enum class enums.ActionType
     
    seatCustomer(int, int, LocalTime) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Marks a customer as seated
    seatCustomerByCode(int, int, LocalTime) - Method in class logicControllers.ReservationController
    Processes the seating of a customer when they arrive at the restaurant.
    SeatCustomerCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for seating a customer when they arrive at the restaurant.
    SeatCustomerCommand() - Constructor for class commands.SeatCustomerCommand
     
    SeatCustomerHandler - Class in handlers
    Handles server responses related to seating a customer.
    SeatCustomerHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.SeatCustomerHandler
     
    SeatCustomerRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request message to seat a customer at a table.
    SeatCustomerRequest(int, int) - Constructor for class messages.SeatCustomerRequest
    Constructs a new SeatCustomerRequest with the specified user ID and confirmation code.
    SEATED - Enum constant in enum class enums.ExitReason
    The customer was seated in the restaurant.
    SEATED - Enum constant in enum class enums.ReservationStatus
    The customer has been seated.
    SEATED - Enum constant in enum class enums.WaitingStatus
     
    seats - Variable in class messages.InsertTableRequest
    The maximum number of seats (capacity) for the new table.
    seats - Variable in class messages.UpdateTableRequest
    The new number of seats to be assigned to the table.

    seatsField - Variable in class Controllers.TablesController
     
    selectedUserId - Static variable in class Controllers.SubscribersHistortOrdersController
    The user ID for which to show reservations if the current user is not a subscriber.
    sendError(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.AddSpecialDateCommand
    Sends an error response back to the client.
    sendError(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.DeleteSpecialDateCommand
    Sends a failure response back to the client.
    sendError(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.UpdateClosingTimeCommand
    Sends an error response back to the client.
    sendError(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.UpdateOpeningTimeCommand
    Sends an error response back to the client.
    sendError(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.UpdateSpecialDateCommand
    Sends an error response back to the client.
    sendRequest(Message) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Sends a message to the server
    sendSuccess(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.AddSpecialDateCommand
    Sends a successful response back to the client including updated restaurant settings.
    sendSuccess(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.DeleteSpecialDateCommand
    Sends a successful response back to the client, including the updated restaurant settings object.
    sendSuccess(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.UpdateClosingTimeCommand
    Sends a successful response back to the client including updated restaurant settings.
    sendSuccess(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.UpdateOpeningTimeCommand
    Sends a successful response back to the client including updated restaurant settings.
    sendSuccess(ConnectionToClient, String) - Method in class commands.UpdateSpecialDateCommand
    Sends a successful response back to the client including the updated restaurant settings.
    sendToAllClients(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Sends a message to every client connected to the server.
    sendToAllClients(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    Sends a message to every client connected to the server.
    sendToClient(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    Sends an object to the client.
    sendToClient(ConnectionToClient, boolean, Bill, String) - Method in class commands.PayCommand
    Wraps the response data and sends it back to the client.
    sendToServer(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    Sends an object to the server.
    sendToServer(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    Sends an object to the server.

    server - package server
     
    server - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    The adapter used to simulate multiple class inheritance.
    server - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    A reference to the Server that created this instance.
    SERVER_CLOSED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    The string sent to the observers when the server has closed.
    SERVER_STARTED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    The string sent to the observers when the server has started.
    SERVER_STOPPED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    The string sent to the observers when the server has stopped.
    ServerApp - Class in server
    The main entry point for the Server application.
    ServerApp() - Constructor for class server.ServerApp
     
    serverClosed() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Hook method called when the server is clased.
    serverClosed() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    Hook method called when the server is closed.
    serverClosed() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableOriginatorServer
    Method called each time the server is closed.
    serverClosed() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    This method is called when the server is closed.
    ServerController - Class in server
    Main server controller that extends the AbstractServer.
    ServerController(int) - Constructor for class server.ServerController
    Constructs a new ServerController on the specified port.
    ServerResponse - Class in common
    Represents a standard response from the server.
    ServerResponse(boolean, Object, String) - Constructor for class common.ServerResponse
    Constructs a new ServerResponse.
    serverSocket - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    The server socket: listens for clients who want to connect.
    serverStarted() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Hook method called when the server starts listening for connections.
    serverStarted() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    Hook method called when the server starts listening for connections.
    serverStarted() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableOriginatorServer
    Method called each time the server is started.
    serverStarted() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    This method is called when the server starts listening for connections.
    serverStopped() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Hook method called when the server stops accepting connections.
    serverStopped() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    Hook method called when the server stops accepting connections.
    serverStopped() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableOriginatorServer
    Method called each time the server is stopped.
    serverStopped() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    This method is called when the server stops accepting connections for any reason.
    ServerUIController - Class in server
    Controller class for the Server's Graphical User Interface.
    ServerUIController() - Constructor for class server.ServerUIController
     
    service - Variable in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    The service instance used to simulate multiple class inheritance.
    service - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    The service used to simulate multiple class inheritance.

    Initializes and launches the server-side infrastructure. 1.

    Start date of the reporting period.

    The start date of the range for the waiting list retrieval.

    Stops the JavaFX application.

    Causes the server to stop accepting new connections.

    Causes the server to stop accepting new connections.

    Submits an alternative reservation for a chosen date and time.

    Submits an alternative reservation for a guest when the original date/time is unavailable.

    Submits a reservation for a guest with the specified email and phone.
    submitReservation() - Method in class Controllers.BaseReservationController
    Submits a reservation for the selected date, time, and number of diners.

    switchToPrevious() - Static method in class util.SceneManager
    Switches to the previously displayed scene, if any.
